subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto God! Thanks be unto His loved ones, and glory unto His chosen ones who have not altered His bounty, who have arisen to serve Him, and who have given freely [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الشکر لاولیائه و الثناء لاصفیائه الذین مابدلوا نعمته و قاموا علی خدمته و انفقوا
subcodes.subjects: @soul; spirit after death, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @call to action, @rejection by the people of the Bayan, @proclamation to the people of the world, @praise and encouragement, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @love and unity
